Raban,

So I see you have decided to make use of my gift to you. A good choice. I am of the impression everything will come to pass exactly as I anticipated.

Good luck, and I hope you will achieve our common goals.

<d target="data_raban_fandavid">Your fan,
David Johns</d>

Hey Raban,

I finished revising the article you sent me and scheduled it for 3 pm like you asked. Don't know if I'll be available for another one, I'm going to be a bit occupied tonight. Maybe I can spare some time remotely if I get a chance.

One more thing: This Bakay thing is getting ugly. Lots of TNB believers are flooding us with threats on Blabber. Did you read any of that? Creeping me out. You know, I'd go to any length with you, <d target="data_raban_ilyabrother">just like when we moved to The Nation. You're my brother.</d> Nothing can change that. It's even fine if you're not telling me the whole truth, what about Karen? They even insult her! She doesn't deserve to be treated that way.

Don't you think it's about time you gave out a statement? You can easily debunk these lies.

Ilya

David,

Thank you for your ongoing support and your kind words, as always. You have proven yourself <d target="data_raban_davidsupporter">to be a true supporter of our cause</d>.

You will want to watch the news. <d target="data_raban_stir">I have no doubts there will be a great stir very soon.</d>

Raban

Dear Mr. Vhart,

We regret having to inform you that we have temporarily suspended our recurring financial support to your endeavor. Our team has become aware of you using our donations to support a cause or causes directly or indirectly violating our Terms of Use.

As you know, Angels of The Nation is an independent non-profit organization with the intention to support beneficial causes in or directed at Parges. We strictly enforce a zero-tolerance policy on endorsement or incitement of aggressive acts or violent behavior of any kind, which we have been made aware of your blog has engaged in recently.

The payments will remain suspended while we further investigate the allegations. Afterwards we will decide on whether to continue our payments or to permanently terminate our support.

If you would like to object this suspension or assist in resolving the allegations against you, please contact us via mail or telephone at the next possible occasion.

Best regards

Damien Fergusson
Representative
Angels of The Nation

March 20, 2017

Ilya

Hey you

You

Hey, what's up

Ilya

Just wanted to see whether <d target="data_ilya_madeawebsite">the website I set up for you</d> is still running?

You

Yeah, all good :)

You

Guess I totally forgot to even thank you for it... :-/ How about catching up for a coffee some time?

Ilya

Great to hear it's all good :) You don't need to thank me.

Come on, Ilya... it's the least I can do :)

Well, I won't say no then! Maybe we can also go for a round of HoB if you like?

Sure thing!

March 30, 2017

You

The session didn't go too well today. Is there something you'd like to get off your chest?

Molly

Just have a lot on my mind right now

You

I understand. I was honestly hoping you'd let me help you a bit more for once.

Molly

You can't help me

You

You know that's not true. I have dealt with a lot of cases, many of them were <d target="data_karen_veteranrose">war veterans like you, even if they weren't dishonorably discharged</d>.

Molly

You have no idea

April 10, 2017

You

<d target="data_karen_meetingnina">Looking forward to our session on the 13th!</d> Would be great to catch up on how things are going for you lately! :)

Molly

You sure? I can only meet super late. Need to work beforehand

You

That's no problem!

Molly

Ah whatever

Singular Ltd.

Hey there!
<el>
We're happy to confirm that <d target="data_ilya_nicknamesingular">your friend "DamnGoodCoffee" has accepted your promotional code for Singular</d>! You will immediately receive 2,000 Love Credits.
<el>
The Singular Team

April 12, 2017

Bill

Are you awake? I need your help. Think I am having a panic attack... Can't breathe

You

Ok, I am here for you, Bill. Are you alone?

Bill

No. But I can't wake up my wife. What should I do?!!

You

Everything is going to be fine, Bill. Think of what we talked about. This is a temporary condition and there is nothing to be afraid of. This will pass. I know this is very hard, but try to breathe slowly and consistently. Four seconds in, four seconds out, just like we practiced.

Bill

It's not working... I'm so scared, please help me!

You

Count to four, Bill. Breathe in and out, in and out, just like we practiced. 

You

Are you still there? Do you want me to call you, Bill?

Bill

No! My wife will hear it. I think it's getting a bit better now.

You

Try to think of something soothing. I know this might sound generic, but try to think of a place where you felt really safe. We'll have to talk about this in our next session, but this can really help.

Bill

Yes. I think I already feel a bit better now. Gosh, I feel so stupid. It really helps to chat with you though. Thank you so much, you are a real life-saver.

You

Don't feel stupid. Everything is going to be okay. In case the feeling comes back you can also contact me via <d target="data_karen_chathandle">my uTell Karen_Levine</d>.

Bill

Thank you!

Yeah, there was hardly a way around it with social media. I... I still don't quite get how you pulled that off. These photos, how did you get them? Were the shelter's cameras still working? Is... is this why you kept that old notebook?

No, not always. <d target="data_raban_warnedilyaandkaren">I'm relying on you both. If there is any weakness between us, they will find it, and they will exploit it.</d> You are the only people that I trust. The only people that matter to me.

Dear Watergate employee ILYA VHART,

We have detected irregularities in your section. Please refer to the URGENT MEMO on our intranet for full details, and issue a statement before tomorrow 8 am.

Thank you.

Morgan McGuire
Product Security

Dear Mr. McGuire,

Please find my written statement below as requested:

I arrived at work early yesterday afternoon, around 3.51 pm. Soon after my arrival I noticed I had left my security card at home, so, in absence of Mr. Budija, I decided to inform my colleague Mr. Ellisson about it. Mr. Ellisson assured me I would be totally fine despite being unable to log in properly, and that he would get the matter sorted for me.

During the entire shift starting from 4 pm I was working on maintaining the assigned technical instruments in sections A through G, until I finally finished up and left around 11.22 pm and <d target="data_ilya_athome">got home where I still am</d>. Apart from the missing security card, there were no unusual events. I did not even see anybody in the labs and I am sure I wasn't seen by anyone else either. In short: <d target="data_ilya_wenttowork">I was at work on Thursday as planned and I have been the entire shift on my own.</d>

Mr. Ellisson will gladly confirm this statement.

Best regards
Ilya Vhart

Raban,

Your recent experiences with your brother must be wearing you down. I understand.

I have no doubt your brother will return to loyally stand by you and your campaign the moment it is fruitful. And fruitful it will be. You have just taken the first steps and you are about to take another.

Of course I cannot tell you whether the allegations spreading on Blabber against Ilya are true. You need to find that out for yourself. But it is for sure revolutionaries, those who speak true and all their loved ones around them, have always been the first targets to be hit by any oppressive regime. Be watchful.

You must see through what you've started. We believe in you.

<d target="data_raban_fandavid2">Your fan,
David Johns</d>

Raban,

Your recent experiences with your wife must be wearing you down. I understand.

I have no doubt your wife will understand the efforts you have put into your campaign the moment it is fruitful. And fruitful it will be. You have just taken the first steps and you are about to take another.

Of course I cannot tell you whether the allegations spreading on Blabber against Karen are true. You need to find that out for yourself. But it is for sure revolutionaries, those who speak true and all their loved ones around them, have always been the first targets to be hit by any oppressive regime. Be watchful.

You must see through what you've started. We believe in you.

<d target="data_raban_fandavid2">Your fan,
David Johns</d>

Dear David,

You have always stuck to me throughout so many years and never let me down once. This is why I turn to you. I have the feeling you are the only person I can fully trust.

I'm at a loss.

I fear my brother has lost all sense of purpose for our cause. He has stood so firmly by my side, but in recent time he has become more and more oblivious to his duties. At times I think he is outright rebellious even, at the brink of throwing it all away, leaving me behind.

Today I get to read on Blabber of all places that he has supposedly stealing supplies from his employer. I don't quite know what to make of that. It could be well placed defamation, I am used to that as you're aware of. But something tells me there is more to it.

<d target="data_raban_discouraged">I feel I am lacking the strength to continue with what I am doing. The road to achieve a truly free, peaceful Parges seems ever further away than ever.</d>

I need your advise: Tell me, am I still on the right track?

Raban

Dear David,

You have always stuck to me throughout so many years and never let me down once. This is why I turn to you. I have the feeling you are the only person I can fully trust.

I'm at a loss.

Karen, my wife, and I... There has been so much distance between us recently, and it is only growing. She is spending so much time with her job, she seems almost obsessed with it - and I with mine, admittedly.

Today I get to read on Blabber of all places that she has been spending her time not even officially for her counsel, no, instead she has been working in secret. I don't quite know what to make of that. It could be well placed defamation, I am used to that as you're aware of. But something tells me there is more to it.

<d target="data_raban_discouraged">I feel I am lacking the strength to continue with what I am doing. The road to achieve a truly free, peaceful Parges seems ever further away than ever.</d>

I need your advise: Tell me, am I still on the right track?

Raban

[You]
Hey lovely man, how are you today? :)
<el>
[Raban]
Hey :) Not so good.
<el>
[You]
What happened?
<el>
[Raban]
I stood in the lunch line for one and a half hours and then there was nothing but bread left. You know I am not at all fussy with food, but after not having any lunch for the last two days, it stresses me out. The guy at the food handout told me to fuck off if I didn't like it.
<el>
[You]
Oh my god, I have no idea how you stay so calm! It makes me furious even hearing about it!! I would have exploded a long time ago. If the guy at the office canteen talked to me like that, I'd get him fired
<el>
[Raban]
You know you can't compare this place to an office canteen.
<el>
[You]
I know, it's just... How is it even legal to treat people like that?!
<el>
[Raban]
Calm down, love. I don't mind people being assholes, they're just stressed out themselves. What really bugs me is that nobody really gives a shit about anyone here. Everyone is just trying to get by without being hungry or tired day by day.
<el>
[You]
Hang in there, darling! Never forget, you're a real hero. To the others... and to me :)
<el>
[Raban]
I love how you always want to help me. But please stop saying that, it makes me uncomfortable.
<el>
[You]
You are far too modest. You should be proud of what you've done! Anyway, not much longer now! I can't wait :)
<el>
[You]
By the way, I have picked a location: <d target="data_karen_marriagelocation">I think we could have a beautiful wedding ceremony at Bonton City Park.</d> I just wanted to keep it small and in the open air, instead of renting a huge venue and making a big fuss about it. Plus I think it'll make for some really nice, serene photos :)
<el>
[Raban]
Anything you want is fine for me.
But Karen, you are sure you want this, aren't you? I'm getting the feeling I've been rushing you into something that might not be good for you.
<el>
[You]
Raban, come on. You didn't rush me at all, it was my idea
<el>
[You]
Do you want this? If you want it, I am absolutely sure. <d target="data_karen_inlovewithraban">I love you!</d>
<el>
[Raban]
Yes. I love you, too.
<el>
[You]
Then let's do it! :)

Beautiful Dewhurst Lifestyle Dewhurst is the Nation's most multicultural city with beautiful cafes and markets from all over the world. It's a beautiful place for young couples and singles to enjoy an adventurous, open-minded lifestyle. Sightseeing There are lots of beautiful spots in Dewhurst. The classical-style Townhall, built in 1780 is definitely worth a visit. The most popular photo spot is the scenic Fountain of Dancing Putti. Cuisine Dewhurst provides you with restaurants, cafes and small diners with dishes from around the world. Don't forget to try our famous Dewhurst hotdogs!

April 8, 2017

Damien Morgan

Hey dude, didn't find the chance to congratulate you yet! What an epic win! Congrats!!

You

Thanks! It still seems surreal :D

Damien Morgan

Ilya Vhart - Winner of the HoB Major 2017, sounds good to me! :)

You

Yeah, sure does! Know what sounds even better? Dewhurst, that's what!

Damien Morgan

What's up with that?

You

I'm outta here, straight on my way to Dewhurst! Very soon.

Damien Morgan

Oh wow, we're gonna miss you, man! But I'm really happy for you. Best of luck!

You

Thanks, Damien.

July 16, 2016

Cassandra Watergate

god im so sick of this place!

Cassandra Watergate

how do you keep up with this ilya?? every time i see you it seems like nothing ever troubles you

You

I'm holding on to my dreams... :)

You

You know, one day I'm getting out of here, I can feel it. I'll only do the stuff I want to then.

Cassandra Watergate

huh didn't think you'd be one to call it quits so easily

You

Nah, it's not exactly easy. <d target="data_ilya_lifewithoutraban">Truth be told, I often dream about quitting... and not just quitting,  but getting out and away from my brother.</d> From everything and everyone. But I can't leave him, he needs me.

Cassandra Watergate

i feel you

You

I can't imagine how... Just had a look at that X-Mas Party photo of you on my phone. You seemed so carefree! Your parents are crazy rich people, nothing should be worrying you!

Cassandra Watergate

crazy rich assholes more like

Cassandra Watergate

we argue about the course of the company constantly

Cassandra Watergate

"BLUE HAIR! are you even thinking?? you don't represent the values of THE COMPANY with blue hair" it's always the fucking COMPANY all the time!

You

I get it. My brother can be like that at times. Shit, that's ugly, I thought they were kinda nice! 

Cassandra Watergate

for the cameras only

You

If you hate it that much why don't you go then?

Cassandra Watergate

how?? it's what they call the golden cage. life is nice and they feed you with silver spoons and shit but there's no getting away... not from family. you can't run from a name

You

Yeah, right.

You

Cassi, what would you really like to do if you could just walk your own path?

Cassandra Watergate

art

Cassandra Watergate

definitely art always loved that. i know it sounds kinda dumb.

You

Doesn't sound dumb to me! Keep dreaming, one day, perhaps...

Cassandra Watergate

yeah if lightning strikes me or something ;)

[You]
Hey Dad
<el>
[Peter Young]
Hey Iris, what's up?
<el>
[You]
How are you, Dad? Is everything fine?
<el>
[Peter Young]
Sure. Billy has been a bit annoying recently, but you know what he's like. Continuously trying to find a way into that old closet, because he knows exactly where the beef jerky is. That dog really manages to drive me incredibly insane sometimes. But when he lies beside me on the couch in the evenings, I just can't help but not to be mad at him. At least he keeps me company.
<el>
[You]
Look... Dad. I just wanted you to promise me that you will always be very careful. Look after yourself. And Billy.
<el>
[Peter Young]
Sweetie, you've been behaving a bit strange lately. Is anything wrong? I'm not as good as your Mum used to be at these things, but you know I'm always here for you.

[You]
Yes, I know.
<el>

You busy bee. I understand.

I'll talk to you soon, Dad.

Have a good night, Sweetie.

From: unknown sender Received: 6.47 a.m. on April 12, 2017 Subject: "Disappear" Investigator, We know you have been blabbering about your "new job" controlling David Johns and the others despite us telling you explictly not to do so. If you believe us to be joking, be advised we are not. In fact, we can easily make you "disappear", as you put it. Or other people. Meanwhile, we are keeping a protecting eye on you on your father. You may thank us later. Time to start taking this job opportunity we gave you very seriously. Don't mess up.

How the hell is that little tidbit supposed to calm things down between Raban and I? Also, when were you planning to abscond with me, huh? Why would you write those things? You know how easy comments are thrown about online…

I-- Karen, listen, I was tired of the secrecy! Sure, it might have been arrogant assuming you would leave with me, but I just couldn't hide how I feel about you! I want this to be real between us, and we sure as hell can’t make a real attempt in this town. Not now… not after everything that has happened.

Then why wouldn't you tell ME? Why spread it online? Now, the worst thing is, despite everything… I’m almost flattered. I can’t believe you put me in this situation, but thinking about it… I can’t. I can’t just leave my patients behind. I need to take care of them. As for Raban, well… I need to take care of him, too.

She was there against my advice! To track down this impertinent army woman... Karen wouldn't listen. <d target="data_raban_karendeservesindicent">She just pressed on and ignored me. She suffered the consequences because of it. </d>

Raban,

I'm not quite as dead as you had planned. Not yet. I may be soon, but for now, I've found a way to at least write this mail.

<d target="data_raban_workswithoffice">I didn't expect you to sink so low as to work with The Office</d>, that's why I couldn't figure it out back then. But the recent days have opened my eyes. The arrest. All those interrogations they put me through. You're with them. It's the only way you may have obtained internal info on me and created that leak.

Yes, I have been working with them as well. But, tell me, what choice did I have after they arrested me, tortured me, forced me to become... THIS.

<d target="data_bayte_amplefordgetrid">Now The Office wants to get rid of me</d>, else they wouldn't have sent me to that godforsaken shelter. And in your blind rage you became their tool. Because of what? Did you really think me behind what happened to Prava Secondary? <d target="data_bayte_insearchofshelter">My unit was being targeted by someone unknown, that was all!</d>

<d target="data_bayte_daughterdied">FOR GOD'S SAKE, RADKA DIED IN THAT BOMBING</d>, YOU FOOL. WHY IN ALL HELL WOULD I KILL MY OWN DAUGHTER?!

Fuck you, Raban, and your empire of lies. From the bottom of my heart. We'll both meet each other in hell for the mistakes we've made. As soon as The Office is done with you, too.

Oleg

Raban,

I could not help but notice that you seem under a lot of fire from all sides most recently. Even some of your most trusted followers are turning their backs on you. But not me.

You have been through some dark times before, as you have trusted me with. Remember how you told me that <d target="data_ilya_leftparentsbehind">Ilya got your parents Anastasia and Milovan in deep trouble</d> and you saw no way out? And here your stand nonetheless. Because you have pulled through.

I will see what I can uncover to aid you. You'll hear back from me soon.

David

Dear Mr. Vhart,

It is with deep regret that I am writing you to inform you your wife <d target="data_karen_dead">Mrs. Karen Levine-Vhart has passed away</d> two hours ago.

Unfortunately, any attempts to stabilize her condition have failed. I know that added distress is caused by the fact your wife was brought in under the circumstances of non-disclosure due to the ongoing investigation of the bombing she was involved in.

You may want to know that we also have informed Mrs. Levine-Vhart's brother-in-law, Mr. Ilya Vhart, as she had stated in personal documentation.

I sincerely regret that this message could not be given to you in person, and must cause so much sorrow for you. My deepest sympathies are with you.

Sincerely,
Dorothy Weaver, PhD
Bonton Central Hospital
